_note: Appellate courts relevant to family-law appeals. Every state supreme court + intermediate courts of appeal where they exist + all 13 US Circuit Courts of Appeals. Rendered on the map with amber hexagonal markers distinct from teal trial-court teardrops. Each entry: state, name, jurisdiction (federal|state), level (circuit|intermediate|supreme|court_of_last_resort), address, url, fipsHint (county or state FIPS for marker placement).
